tasks.description: Fix step nodes unclickable — section overlay intercepts pointer events. Set pointer-events: none on section node container div so step node clicks pass through to React Flow's onNodeClick. Re-enable pointer-events: auto on section's interactive child elements (name label, badges, annotation dots).
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a step node inside a section opens Step Details panel (not Section Details)
Clicking on the section background (empty area) still opens Section Details panel
Section name label, annotation dots, and comment/task badges remain clickable
Step nodes outside sections remain clickable

patterns_to_follow: React Flow parent-child node click delegation

tasks.special_instructions: The section node outer div currently receives all clicks because it spans the full section area. In React Flow, when a parent node and child node overlap, the click goes to the node whose DOM element is topmost. Add pointer-events: none to the section container's main content area, then pointer-events: auto on interactive elements (section name text, badges). The section's background click should still work via React Flow's built-in node click detection on the node wrapper. Test by verifying handleNodeClick receives step-* node IDs when clicking steps inside sections.

tasks.description: Fix Spend Summary missing Cancelled status breakdown row. Remove the conditional wrapper around the Cancelled row in tool-analysis-view.tsx so it always displays (matching Active and Considering rows).
acceptance_criteria: Spend Summary card shows all 3 status rows: Active, Considering, Cancelled — always visible
Cancelled row shows $0/mo when no cancelled tools exist
Cancelled row shows correct total when cancelled tools exist

patterns_to_follow: Active and Considering rows render unconditionally — match that pattern

tasks.special_instructions: Line ~156: remove the `{spendByStatus.cancelled > 0 && (...)}` conditional wrapper. Keep the inner div content. Also remove the conditional border-t/mt-3/pt-3 styling — the Cancelled row should match Active and Considering row styling for consistency.

tasks.description: Push migration 024 (step_tools) to remote Supabase DB. Migration file exists at supabase/migrations/024_step_tools.sql but was never pushed. Run npx supabase db push. Also resolves BUG-032 (same root cause).
acceptance_criteria: npx supabase db push succeeds without errors
step_tools table exists in remote Supabase schema
TypeScript compiles clean (no code changes expected)

patterns_to_follow: Previous migration push pattern from BUG-022/028/029
learnings_relevant: S001: uuid_generate_v4() fails — use gen_random_uuid(). Already correct in 024.

tasks.special_instructions: This is a DB migration push, not a code change. Run: npx supabase db push. The migration file already uses gen_random_uuid() (not uuid_generate_v4()), so no code fix needed. If push fails, check if Supabase CLI is linked (npx supabase link --project-ref tkcyxtxkmveipnwgrddd). After push, verify by curling the step-tools API endpoint. This also resolves BUG-032 (same root cause — step_tools table missing).

shared_files.note: No shared file modifications needed for these bug fixes
